---
name: Tool Suggestion
about: Suggest a CLI tool to add to the toolkit
title: "[tool] "
labels: tool-suggestion
---

## Tool name

<!-- e.g. `tokei` -->

## What it replaces

<!-- What stock command or GUI app does this improve on? e.g. `wc -l` / manual line counting -->

## GitHub link

<!-- e.g. https://github.com/XAMPPRocky/tokei -->

## Why it belongs

<!-- What problem does it solve for someone moving from GUI to terminal? Keep it practical. -->

## Which tier?

- [ ] Minimal (~12 core tools — must be essential)
- [ ] Intermediate (~25 tools — productivity boost)
- [ ] Full (45+ tools — nice to have)

## Already in Homebrew?

<!-- Run `brew info <tool>` to check. We only include tools available in homebrew-core or homebrew-cask. -->
